working: Two fresh sends landed 2026-06-29 and both lifted +15.8% over baseline (19 -> 22 daily sessions); Staff-Client eNews - June 2026 reached 8,894 inboxes at a 40.75% open rate.
Best sends by traffic lift remain Staff-Client eNews - May 2026 (+66.5%) and Alumni eNews: Final Reminder - June 2026 (+65.2%), both far above their baselines.
Open rates are strong versus the 25-35% health/nonprofit benchmark: the Constant Contact list averages 51.86% open, with recent sends running 40-55% (Alumni eNews - June 55.81%).
SEO visibility grew: GSC impressions rose +8.7% (1,447 -> 1,573) and tracked keywords with data climbed from 21 to 23 vs the last run.
Organic Social edged up from 46 to 50 sessions vs the prior run.
not_working: UTM leakage is systemic: all 10 windowed sends show email_sessions_3d=0 while direct_sessions_3d runs 19-53, so newsletter links carry no UTM tags and GA4 miscredits Email as Direct (the Email channel logged just 1 session in 90 days).
Direct is 50.7% of sessions (1,024) and is inflated by that leakage, masking the true email contribution.
Referring Partners eNews - June 2026 opened at 21.36%, below the 25-35% benchmark, with a 0.73% click rate.
Organic Social is only 2.5% of traffic (50 sessions) - a persistently weak channel.
Window sessions dipped slightly (2,041 -> 2,021) and GSC avg position slipped 31.49 -> 31.64; only 3 clicks came off 1,573 impressions because position ~31 is too deep to convert.
do_next: Add utm_source=constantcontact&utm_medium=email (plus utm_campaign) to every Constant Contact newsletter link - the single highest-value fix; it reclaims email attribution now buried in Direct.

Repromote the themes that lifted most: Staff-Client eNews (+66.5% in May) and the Alumni 'Final Reminder' format (+65.2% in June); mid/late-month Staff-Client blasts to the ~9k list drive the biggest lifts.
Lift the Referring Partners eNews open rate (21.36%) with subject-line and send-time tests; the large Staff-Client list opens at 40%+ for comparison.
SEO: position is slipping (31.64) while impressions rise (1,573) - push on-page and internal links for the 23 tracked keywords to move rankings into click range.
summary: Marketing is healthy on engagement - 51.86% average opens and two new +15.8% sends - but UTM leakage still credits email traffic to Direct (email_3d=0 on all 10 sends), so tagging newsletter links remains the top priority; SEO impressions are up +8.7% though average position (31.6) is still too deep to earn clicks.
